summary: M3-POLITY-VASSALAGE-001 is closed after PR #57 entered main at 3b0c90b0f5723d962966293bf4bb64b2a46f17c3. The M3 polity/vassalage substrate is integrated and the next dependency-ready M3 candidates are M3-ADMIN-BURDEN-001 and M3-CHARACTER-OFFICE-FIXTURE-001.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed in 1m18s; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed in 1m0s.
PR #57 merged and local main fast-forwarded to 3b0c90b0f5723d962966293bf4bb64b2a46f17c3.

decisions: M3-POLITY-VASSALAGE-001 is CLOSED because its accepted PR entered main.
The explicit state.m3 save rejection remains intentional until M3-SAVE-RUNTIME-001 opens packages/save-format scope.
Do not start downstream M3 implementation in the closure branch.
risks: M3 save/load persistence is intentionally deferred to M3-SAVE-RUNTIME-001.
Downstream M3 tasks still need normal lead-owned routing, writer handoff, reviewer handoff, and integration.
requested_action: Open and merge the closure PR, then continue with the next dependency-ready M3 task under autonomous goal-mode gates.
